title: cyanus dominii
intro: Cyanus dominii, also known as Cornflower, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its vibrant blue flowers and slender stems. Traditionally, Cornflower has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating eye issues, such as conjunctivitis and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Cornflower include its ability to soothe irritated eyes, reduce swelling, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Cornflower is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried flower infusion for its medicinal uses, and is also used in herbal skincare products for its potential skin-soothing properties.
